audit_causation: Every transition audit event references the authenticated request_envelope_id; the writer component is never treated as the requester.
purpose_rule: purpose is immutable from proposal through the terminal state

local_runtime_fence.new_external_effect_rule: current token must match both grant and attempt bindings immediately before adapter contact
local_runtime_fence.recovery_rule: internal fail-closed transitions and evidence admission use a fresh authorized recovery_context and preserve the historical token; a stale historical token never blocks marking indeterminate or settling known evidence
local_runtime_fence.stage_boundary: This is the Stage-1 serial coordinator fence and does not authorize Stage-4 distributed ownership or distributed fencing.

proposed: no claim, dispatch entry, attempt, or external effect exists
preparing: preparation evaluates authority, policy, approval, budget, resource, scope, deadline, registry, kill-switch, and local runtime fence together
prepared: preparation result is complete but has no durable execution authority
committed: authority snapshot, policy decision, approval claims, budget reservation, resource claims, local runtime fence, execution grant, and dispatch journal entry were atomically persisted
only the serial executor may dispatch
executing: adapter invocation is bounded by the operation contract
cancel_requested: claims remain held until effect disposition is known
settling: ledger settlement and evidence validation are pending
indeterminate: budget, resource claims, locks, and evidence are retained
completed: required effect and settlement are proven complete
terminal audit and evidence references exist
aborted: claims are safely released or settled
terminal audit and evidence references exist

common_transition_guards: expected source state and expected aggregate version match under row lock
immutable tenant_id, area_id, project_id, session_id, goal_id, action_intent_id, and purpose match
authenticated actor comes from trusted runtime context and is declared for the transition
the fence requirement declared by the transition class is satisfied; only new external effects require the durable current local runtime fence
the transition deadline is present and current
the Action Transition Gate performs the mutation and audit atomically

authority: purpose-specific proposal authority from authoritative snapshot

rules.description: authenticated scope and request causation match
purpose is canonical and allowed by goal_state_matrix
proposal authority and role bindings resolve from authoritative stores
operation is registered
no row with action_intent_id exists

reconciliation.description: stale preparing work is safely abortable because no external effect or durable claim exists
